pi_items.source: Task description requests saving as 'Sales_Story_Presentation' and Oracle Analytics uses .dva extension.
Task description explicitly specifies this exact text, and data analysis of order_lines.csv confirms it is factually correct.
Task description requests a 'Bar Chart visualization'.
Task description requests showing data by 'Product Category'.
env.json specifies the default Windows user is 'Docker', making this the standard Documents path.
Task description specifies using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset, which is standard Oracle sample data.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a bar chart using the 'Sales' measure and 'Product Category' dimension from the synthetic 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. The agent must switch to Narrate mode, add the exact annotation 'Technology generates the highest revenue' (which is factually supported by the data), and save the workbook as 'Sales_Story_Presentation.dva' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.
